zipStorePath = wrapper/dists
distributionBase = GRADLE_USER_HOME
distributionPath = wrapper/dists

distributionUrl = file:///D://all_dev_sdk//gradle_home//gradle-8.10.2-bin.zip

# 主模块下的 gradle.properties
